title: crotalaria fallax
intro: Crotalaria fallax is a plant species known as a shrub, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Crotalaria fallax can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
